name: s-agentos-kernel-v0.1.3-workflowman
source: Merged/patched from the uploaded Kimi kernel ZIP plus previous S/ AgentOS implementation pack concepts.
patches: Command gateway accepts X-AgentOS-Key and Authorization Bearer.
Command gateway validates S_AGENTOS_OPERATOR_KEY and preserves original body/headers after auth.
Docker Compose passes AgentOS runtime env vars into n8n container.
Registry, telemetry, and evolution workflows accept both auth header styles.
OpenAPI schema and JSON schemas added.
